overview: KidiCare is a pediatric health monitoring system for caregivers. It collects physiological sensor data (GSR, pulse, motion) from ESP32 hardware kits worn by children, runs AI-powered emotion detection, and presents real-time health status on a caregiver dashboard with alerts for stress and distress events.
features: Child profile management (create, view, edit, delete)
ESP32 sensor data ingestion via HTTP endpoint
AI emotion detection via external model integration
Per-child detail view with HRV, stress, and motion charts (10s updates)
Toast-style visual alerts for stress > 70 or distressed emotion
